pick: Pick a chat on the left, or start a new one.
input_ph: Type a message…  (Enter to send, Shift+Enter = newline)
target_architect: 🪄 AI Studio — build team / app / schedule
delete_confirm: Delete this chat? Its history is removed.
intro_architect: AI Studio — tell me what you want and I build it: a team, a single app/agent, or schedule one to run automatically (e.g. 'every morning, send to Telegram'). Like chatting to build it.
intro_group: Chatting with this team — it remembers the whole conversation.
prune_title: Delete all empty chats (chats with content are safe)
prune_confirm: Delete ALL empty chats (no messages)? Chats with content are safe.
